title: InteroperabilityContract
description: A machine-readable interoperability contract between two sovereign entities. Defines the terms under which they agree to share data, capabilities, or services.

id.description: Unique identifier for this interoperability contract.

parties.description: The sovereign entities party to this contract. Minimum two parties.

role.description: The role this party plays in the interoperability relationship.

authorizedAgents.description: Agents authorized to act on this party's behalf within this contract.

scope.description: What is being shared under this contract.

dataCategories.description: Categories of data covered by this contract.

capabilities.description: API endpoints or capabilities being shared.

excludedData.description: Explicit exclusions — data that is expressly NOT covered even if within a covered category.

purpose.description: The stated purpose of this interoperability relationship. Receiving parties should only use data for this purpose.

mode.description: The primary mode of data exchange.

prohibitions.description: Explicit prohibitions on how the shared data or capabilities may be used.

auditRights.description: Audit rights granted to each party.

logRetentionPeriod.description: How long interaction logs must be retained. ISO 8601 duration.

auditableBy.description: Parties (or their designated auditors) who may inspect logs.

retentionPolicy.description: How long received data may be retained.

maxRetentionDuration.description: Maximum retention period for received data. ISO 8601 duration.

deleteOnContractExpiry.description: Whether the consumer must delete all received data when the contract expires or is terminated.

deleteConfirmationRequired.description: Whether the consumer must confirm deletion to the provider.

terminationTerms.description: How this contract may be terminated.

noticePeriod.description: Required notice period before termination. ISO 8601 duration.

immediateTerminationTriggers.description: Conditions under which any party may terminate immediately without notice.

dataDispositionOnTermination.description: What happens to shared data when the contract ends.

expires.description: When this contract expires. Contracts must have an explicit expiry.

terminated.description: Whether this contract has been terminated before its expiry.

terminatedAt.description: When this contract was terminated, if applicable.
